question: What type of fence is best for my property?
answer: It depends on your priorities. Colorbond steel is the best all-rounder — durable, private, low-maintenance, and available in many colours. Timber paling is more affordable and looks natural. Glass or aluminium pool fencing is required for pool safety compliance. For acreage properties, post-and-wire or post-and-rail is typical. We can talk through the options when we visit your property.
